message:
🐛 Fix Copilot coding agent assignment with GraphQL header

The implement-fix workflow's Assign To Agent step was failing with
"Bot does not have access to the repository" because the GraphQL
mutations were missing the required `GraphQL-Features:
issues_copilot_assignment_api_support` header.

Additionally, the fallback from `replaceActorsForAssignable` to
`addAssigneesToAssignable` only triggered for "Resource not accessible"
errors but not for "Bot does not have access" errors.

Changes:
- Add GraphQL-Features header to findAgent, primary mutation, and
  fallback mutation
- Expand fallback trigger to include "Bot does not have access" error

Verified: `addAssigneesToAssignable` with this header successfully
assigns the Copilot coding agent (BOT_kgDOC9w8XQ) to issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
